entity.summary: Global centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2021 and offering spot, derivatives, fiat purchase, earn, and related services under the Tapbit brand.
entity.notes: Official first-party pages confirm the 2021 founding year and active exchange services. The existing Cayman Islands origin is retained because accessible first-party materials do not provide a stronger current legal-entity domicile. Tapbit marketing describes a U.S. MSB registration as a licence; HEI does not treat FinCEN MSB registration by itself as a prudential exchange licence.

expected.summary: Cayman Islands-based centralized exchange launched in 2021 and still operating under the Tapbit brand.

events.title: Tapbit was founded in 2021
events.description: Tapbit's official platform materials state that the exchange was founded in 2021 and serves global users with spot and derivatives trading.
events.notes: The source establishes the year but not an exact day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

evidence.title: About Tapbit Exchange
evidence.notes: The official support article states that Tapbit was founded in 2021.

evidence.title: About Tapbit
evidence.notes: The official page verifies active spot, futures, fiat purchase, earn, and related products.
